category_sources: source_facts.description says ML workflow orchestration system; official docs describe dstack as a unified control plane for GPU provisioning and orchestration across clouds, Kubernetes, and on-prem clusters.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dstack; official site and repository branding use dstack.
docs_sources: Official dstack website has a dedicated Docs path at https://dstack.ai/docs/ with getting started, concepts, guides, examples, and reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official dstack homepage links GitHub to dstackai/dstack, and official repository links back to dstack.ai/docs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs/repository describe GPU provisioning, development, training, inference, Kubernetes, cloud/on-prem orchestration, and ML workloads.
